name: archmap
description: Map any codebase into architecture.json (fixed schema v1, for the next agent) + architecture.html (self-contained interactive viewer, for humans), with built-in staleness checking against the generating commit.

interface.longDescription: Produces docs/architecture/architecture.json (schema v1, machine-readable) and architecture.html (interactive viewer) from any repo, validated so the map can't lie: paths must exist, coverage is enforced, and the map records the git commit it was generated at.
